item.title: Basic Algebraic Structures
item.description: Algebra (\mathcal{S},☿,...) An Algebra is a set with any number of operations with any arities Magma A Magma is a set with a binary operation.

item.title: Digraphs
item.description: Definition A digraph is a set with a binary relation (set of ordered pairs made from elements in the set) on it. It is simpler than a group.

item.title: Equivalence Relations
item.description: Equivalence Relations a relation \sim is an equivalence relation if it satisfies the following properties Reflexivity x \sim x Symmetry x \sim y \iff y \sim x Transitivity x \sim y \land y \sim z \implies x \sim z Equivalence relations cleanly partition sets.

item.title: Isomorphism
item.description: Isomorphism is a powerful tool in mathematics.

item.title: Law
item.description: A law is a universally quantified equality of terms.

item.title: Logical Operators
item.description: Going forward the set \{0,1\} will be referred to as “Boolean Logic” Magmas (\{0,1\},\lor) Boolean logic under the or operation is a semigroup is a monoid, and the identity is 0 is not a group since 1 has no inverse (\{0,1\},\land) Boolean logic under the and operation Boolean and has an Isomorphism...

item.title: Operation
item.description: Operation An operation is a function which takes a predefined finite number of inputs and whos domain is a power of its codomain.

item.title: Partition
item.description: Given a set $$ A_{i} \subseteq S | \forall i \in \mathbb{N}, \exists j,k < i such that A_k, A_j \subseteq {A}_{i}= S | A_k \cup A_j = S \text{ and }A_k \cap A_j = \varnothing then these sets form a partition on S The pieces of a partition are called "blocks".

item.title: Permutation Groups
item.description: A group is a set with a binary operation that is associative, identity (unless its the empty group, thanks Luna), inverses, closed.

item.title: Disjoint Cycle Notation
item.description: How to Parse When we have a permutation we can write it compactly by writing all the cycles in how numbers are assigned to each other.
